# HireBest

> AI-powered resume screener for hiring teams. Upload CVs, paste a job description, and get ranked candidates with reasoning, missing-skills analysis, and interview questions in seconds.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and how HireBest screens CVs with AI.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Basic, Advanced, Custom Integrated, and Monthly Retainer plans.
- [Contact](/contact): WhatsApp and email support.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How we handle your data.
- [Terms & Conditions](/terms-and-conditions): Terms governing use of HireBest.
- [Refund Policy](/refund-policy): When and how refunds are issued.
